overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city. The clip begins on a sunlit elevated walkway beside a highway with the prominent MILITECH building, transitions through a commercial district with massive digital billboards, and descends into a shadowed urban canyon under heavy infrastructure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated sidewalk with highway and rail tracks to the left, approaching distant pedestrians

entered.detail: massive dark industrial building with MILITECH signage dominating the left side
metal guardrails separating pedestrian walkway from highway traffic below
futuristic high-rise buildings forming the city skyline in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit elevated walkway with the massive MILITECH building dominating the left side. The camera follows the character walking forward along a concrete path separated from highway traffic by metal rails, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with massive digital advertising structures

events.description: large multi-screen digital billboard structure becomes prominent on left side of walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through busier commercial district, passing other pedestrians and approaching large advertising structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue backpack walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall yellow and green structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements
distinctive orange horizontal lamp posts lining the right side of the street
modern glass facade building with reflective windows on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a commercial district where the MILITECH building recedes behind. A massive digital billboard structure with vibrant advertisements dominates the left side, while modern glass buildings line the right. The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians, and distinctive orange street lamps mark the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon transitioning into covered walkway under infrastructure

events.description: entering deep shadow cast by overhead buildings and concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as sunlight fades and environment becomes increasingly shadowed under heavy infrastructure

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure blocking the sky, creating a covered passage effect
thick concrete columns supporting the overpass structure along the left side
illuminated neon advertisements visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the environment transitions into an urban canyon under heavy infrastructure. The massive billboard passes behind as concrete support pillars and an overpass ceiling enter the frame, casting deep shadows that shift the lighting from natural sunlight to a darker, mixed ambiance with distant neon glows ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian passage under urban overpass with artificial illumination

events.description: transitioning from open-air street to fully enclosed covered walkway with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through dark covered passage toward illuminated area ahead, surrounded by concrete infrastructure

entered.detail: dark concrete walls enclosing the pedestrian path on the left side
artificial lights mounted on the ceiling providing illumination in the dark passage

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a deeply shadowed, covered walkway where natural light is completely blocked. Artificial overhead lights illuminate the concrete passage as the character moves toward a distant lit area. The environment feels enclosed and tunnel-like, with support pillars now passing by to the left and the commercial buildings of the previous segments no longer visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit, open-air walkway into the oppressive shadows of a subterranean urban canyon. It begins on a concrete path beside a highway, with the massive Militech building dominating the left side under a clear blue sky. As the character moves forward, the Militech structure recedes and the scene shifts into a vibrant commercial district defined by towering digital billboards and glass buildings. The environment then transitions beneath heavy infrastructure, where concrete support pillars and an overpass ceiling gradually block the sunlight, shifting the lighting from natural gold to a dark, neon-tinged ambiance. Finally, the camera enters a deeply shadowed, tunnel-like passage where artificial overhead lights illuminate the enclosed concrete walkway.
